_comment: External QCP (sac_c_parser) strategy rule-id -> transport list-operation, keyed by strategy name. DERIVED by reading each rule's `action` in QCP_demos_LLM/sll_shape.strategies (NOT the differently-numbered dataset/linux file). Operations name the DATA op produced: 'nil' = [] (discharge an empty listrep/lseg), 'cons' = :: (unfold a listrep/lseg into head-node + tail), 'append' = ++ (Coq app; fuse a segment with its continuation: id 10 = lseg.listrep `listrep(p)=lseg ++ listrep(q)`, id 18 = lseg.lseg). 'snoc' = ++[d] (extend a segment by one node, id 16). 'frame' = match the same listrep on both sides (id 7; the list is carried through unchanged, not a constructor). Only `append` is consumed as an emission gate today (the `lseg ++ tail` composition in fold_expr); the rest are emitted structurally and recorded for documentation. Update if the tool renumbers its rules.
